/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/megatron3000.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/megatron3000.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/megatron3000.dir/storage/disk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/megatron3000.dir/query/query.cpp.o CMakeFiles/megatron3000.dir/query/esquema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/megatron3000.dir/storage/headFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/megatron3000.dir/query/archivo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/megatron3000.dir/control/control.cpp.o -o megatron3000
